title: Positive flow: Navigating through apartment listings
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Gallery' screen. | Tap on the 'Relevance' tab to view the apartment listings. | Scroll through the listings to view the first and second apartment listings. | Tap on the first apartment listing to view more details. | Tap on the second apartment listing to view more details.
expected_result: The app should display the first apartment listing details. | The app should display the second apartment listing details.

title: Negative flow: Invalid tab selection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Gallery' screen. | Tap on the 'Relevance' tab to view the apartment listings. | Tap on the 'Price' tab to view the apartment listings. | Tap on the 'Size' tab to view the apartment listings. | Tap on the 'Updated' tab to view the apartment listings.
expected_result: The app should display the apartment listings sorted by 'Price'. | The app should display the apartment listings sorted by 'Size'. | The app should display the apartment listings sorted by 'Updated'.

title: Boundary validation: Empty search input
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Gallery' screen. | Tap on the search icon in the header. | Enter an empty string in the search input field. | Tap on the search icon to perform the search.
expected_result: The app should display all apartment listings.

expected_result: The app should display the apartment listings sorted by 'Relevance'. | The app should display the apartment listings sorted by 'Price'. | The app should display the apartment listings sorted by 'Size'. | The app should display the apartment listings sorted by 'Updated'.

expected_result: The app should display the apartment listings sorted by 'Relevance'. | The app should display the apartment listings sorted by 'Price'. | The app should display the apartment listings sorted by 'Size'. | The app should display the apartment listings sorted by 'Updated'.
